scope.claim_limit: Synchronized LiDAR-IMU odometry check on public NCLT velodyne_sync + MS25 IMU; supports IMU mechanism evidence but does not by itself promote methods to full LIO T0 without broader coverage.

protocol.seed: first-pose anchor, --no-gt-seed velocity prediction after frame 0
protocol.imu_off_command: Run the same command on a temporary PCD tree without imu.csv (see runner); output -> docs/benchmarks/lio_imu_public/nclt_2013_01_10_120_imu_off.json

imu_on.note: Directional-degeneracy LiDAR-IMU scan-to-submap (first-pose anchored; adaptive per-point outlier gate + IMU-prior degeneracy regularization). deg_dirs/frame rot=0 trans=0

imu_off.note: Scan-to-submap, constant-velocity fallback (no imu.csv; first-pose anchored; degeneracy prior diagnostics-only). deg_dirs/frame rot=0 trans=0

imu_on.note: Degeneracy-factor sensing (condition number) + adaptive MAD-outlier detection + IMU/LiDAR fusion compensation (first-pose anchored). degenerate_frames=41

imu_off.note: Degeneracy sensing, constant-velocity fallback (no imu.csv; first-pose anchored; compensation diagnostics-only). degenerate_frames=47

imu_on.note: Indexed-point dynamic LIO: pseudo-occupancy dynamic detection, delayed removal, and IMU gyro prior. dynamic/frame=364.483333 corr/frame=2410.008333 removed_sum/frame=3342.633333

imu_off.note: Indexed-point dynamic scan-to-map: pseudo-occupancy dynamic detection and delayed removal; no imu.csv so constant-velocity fallback. dynamic/frame=365.875000 corr/frame=2412.550000 removed_sum/frame=3264.816667

imu_on.note: RF-LIO removal-first LIO: adaptive multi-resolution range-image foreground removal before indexed dynamic LIO, with IMU gyro prior. removal_first/frame=438.591667 candidates/frame=438.591667 kept/frame=5495.150000 backend_dynamic/frame=303.075000 corr/frame=2091.341667 backend_removed_sum/frame=17505.375000

imu_off.note: RF-LIO removal-first scan-to-map: adaptive multi-resolution range-image foreground removal before indexed dynamic scan-to-map; no imu.csv so constant-velocity fallback. removal_first/frame=434.025000 candidates/frame=434.025000 kept/frame=5499.716667 backend_dynamic/frame=279.675000 corr/frame=2107.241667 backend_removed_sum/frame=17130.900000

imu_on.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).

imu_off.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).

conclusion: On NCLT 2013-01-10 120-frame window (Velodyne + MS25 IMU) (120 frames, 1100 IMU samples), IMU-gated paths activate for D2-LIO (True), DegenSense (True), ID-LIO (True), and RF-LIO (True). DegenSense IMU compensation lowers ATE from 0.24 m to 0.16 m (~45% worse without IMU); D2-LIO RPE 3.88% vs 3.90% without. KISS-ICP sanity is poor on this window (86% RPE) so the row is mechanism evidence, not a leaderboard claim. LiDAR-IBA IMU is not wired in pcd_dogfooding yet.
